title: v2 browser continuation assertion exchange response
description: Response body for a successful POST /auth/contenttree/exchange (see openapi/plugin-api.yaml and docs/security.md). Accompanies a Set-Cookie response header carrying the newly minted, HttpOnly + Secure + SameSite=Lax browser continuation session cookie. csrf_token is returned in the body (never in a script-readable cookie) so the browser's subsequent state-changing requests within this session can echo it back via the X-ContentTree-CSRF-Token header.

invocation_id.description: Echoes the invocation_id claim of the exchanged assertion, confirming which deferred operation this browser session is now bound to.
